mapper.sql: FROM t_payment_route_record prr LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order latest_pr ON latest_pr.id = ( SELECT pr.id FROM t_prepay_order pr WHERE pr.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN t_payment_attempt latest_pa ON latest_pa.id = ( SELECT pa.id FROM t_payment_attempt pa WHERE pa.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id AND pa.created_at <= prr.created_at ORDER BY pa.created_at DESC, pa.id DESC LIMIT 1 )

if.test: query.routeResult != null and query.routeResult != '' and query.routeResult != '全部'

mapper.select:
SELECT prr.route_no AS routeNo, prr.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, po.order_no AS orderNo, latest_pr.prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, po.customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(po.amount, 2)) AS amount, latest_pa.payment_method AS paymentMethod, prr.channel_code AS channelCode, prr.route_rule AS routeRule, prr.route_result AS routeResult, CASE WHEN prr.route_result LIKE '%兜底%' THEN 'warn' WHEN prr.route_result LIKE '%线下%' THEN 'info' ELSE 'success' END AS routeResultType, latest_pa.terminal AS terminal, latest_pa.client_ip AS clientIp, latest_pa.idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, latest_pa.request_payload AS requestPayload, latest_pa.response_payload AS responsePayload, DATE_FORMAT(prr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt
ORDER BY prr.created_at DESC, prr.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
